programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.desc: Things get out of hand when Louise wins a contest to be principal for a day; Teddy has a unique suggestion to help Bob when he suddenly finds himself unable to flip burgers.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.desc: The family forces Bob to take a much-needed day off, only for him to wind up working at a local sandwich shop; Linda and the kids throw a last-minute baby shower at the restaurant for a female biker group.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.desc: Gene convinces Tina and Louise to help him save a misunderstood plankton blob from being destroyed by a yacht club.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.sub_title: If You Love It So Much, Why Don't You Marionette?
programs.desc: The kids visit a marionette theater for a school field trip, and Louise gets on the theater owner's bad side; Bob takes pity on a guy who's handing out flyers in front of the restaurant.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.sub_title: Long Time Listener, First Time Bob
programs.desc: When Bob meets his personal hero -- a renegade radio DJ who refuses to compromise -- the Belchers get in over their heads while trying to help him stage a comeback.

programs.title: Bob's Burgers
programs.desc: When the kids have to run a mandatory mile for school on free-ice-cream day, they hatch an elaborate plot to sneak away; Bob and Linda frantically try to secure discount tickets to a show at the Wharf Arts Center.
